active.description: Indicates if a user is active or deactivated. Learn more about user deactivation.

lastActivityAt.description:
Date and time when the user was last active.
Format: UTC, adheres to [ISO 8601](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601), includes a [trailing Z offset](https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/ISO_8601#Coordinated_Universal_Time_(UTC)). If the user never logged in, the parameter value is empty.

license.description: Name of the current user license in the organization

licenseAssignedAt.description: Time when the license was assigned to the user

role.description: Name of the user role in the organization

adminRoles.description: List of admin roles assigned to the user

type.description: Type of the admin role prebuilt or custom
